final:
// // This module selects between two 32-bit input data signals, resc3 and roadc5, based on the control input Mtoreg. When Mtoreg is high (1), the output sWritedata will be assigned the value of resc3; when Mtoreg is low (0), it will be assigned the value of roadc5.
module top_module(
     input [31:0]roadc5,
	 input [31:0]resc3,
	 input Mtoreg,
	 output reg [31:0]sWritedata
	 
);always @*
case (Mtoreg) 
      1:
	     sWritedata <= roadc5;
	  0:
	     sWritedata <= resc3;
endcase
endmodule

params_used.custom_text: // This module selects between two 32-bit input data signals, resc3 and roadc5, based on the control input Mtoreg. When Mtoreg is high (1), the output sWritedata will be assigned the value of resc3; when Mtoreg is low (0), it will be assigned the value of roadc5.
